metadata.title: Dataset related to article: Longitudinal neurofunctional changes in medication overuse headache patients after mindfulness practice in a randomized controlled trial (the MIND-CM study)
metadata.description:
The “Salience_17072023_1.nii.gz” file represents the map of the Salience Network implemented in CONN toolbox and used as a seed region in resting-state functional connectivity computation.

The “MINDvsTAUT1vsT0_S2V_SN.nonthr.nii.gz” file represents the longitudinal between-groups comparisons (Δ TaU+MIND vs Δ TaU) unthresholded z-map.

The “MINDvsTAUT1vsT0_S2V_SN.nii.gz” file represents the longitudinal between-groups comparison (Δ TaU+MIND vs Δ TaU) thresholded at p < .05 (FWE-corrected) at the cluster level and p < .001 (uncorrected) at the voxel level.
